generatedArtifacts.coverLetterExcerpt: I am excited to apply for the Eef87aa2 Aa70 443f 9288 59777a64f3f2 role at Jobs. My background in JavaScript, React, Node.js and my focus on becoming a strong Software Engineer make this opportunity especially compelling to me. I would be glad to contribute to Jobs's team with a practical, detail-oriented approach to building reliable backend systems and supporting product delivery in remote collaboration. With my academic foundation and hands-on project work, I am confident I can add value while continuing to grow in a role aligned with Bengaluru opportunities.
